tasks.title: Analyze current listening exercises structure in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts
tasks.description: Read and analyze the existing listening exercises in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts to understand the current structure, question types, and content length. Identify how questions are defined and linked to transcripts.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of the data structure for listening exercises and questions
Documented notes on question types and how questions relate to transcripts
tasks.expectedResult: A documented analysis of the listening exercise data structure and question format

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for expanding exercises with more questions

tasks.title: Design additional question templates for listening exercises
tasks.description: Create a set of new question templates and types to increase the number and variety of questions per listening exercise. Include question types such as multiple choice, true/false, short answer, and extended gap-fill. Define question formats and example questions to be added.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 new question types designed
Example questions created for each new question type
Templates compatible with existing exercise data structure
tasks.expectedResult: A documented set of new question templates and example questions for listening exercises

metadata.inputContext: Analysis of current listening exercise question structure
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides new question formats to enrich listening exercises

tasks.title: Expand existing listening exercises with additional questions in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts
tasks.description: Modify the existing listening exercises in apps/web/src/features/listening/data/exercises.ts to include more questions per exercise. Add at least 3 new questions per exercise using the newly designed question templates. Ensure questions are relevant to the transcript and maintain consistent formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Each listening exercise has at least 3 additional questions
New questions use varied question types
Questions are relevant and answerable from the transcript
tasks.expectedResult: Listening exercises file updated with longer exercises containing more questions

outputPlan.description: Expanded listening exercises with additional questions

metadata.inputContext: New question templates and existing listening exercises data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances listening exercises with more comprehensive question sets

tasks.title: Update listening exercise rendering components to support new question types
tasks.description: Modify the React components responsible for rendering listening exercises and their questions to support the newly added question types (e.g., multiple choice, true/false). Ensure UI elements and interaction handlers are implemented for all question types.
acceptanceCriteria: UI renders all question types correctly
User can interact with new question types as expected
No UI regressions in existing question types
tasks.expectedResult: Listening exercise UI updated to handle and display new question types properly

outputPlan.description: Updated component to render new question types

metadata.inputContext: Expanded listening exercises with new question types
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables UI support for longer and more varied listening exercises

tasks.title: Add automated tests for new listening question types and expanded exercises
tasks.description: Create or update unit and integration tests to cover the new question types and the expanded listening exercises. Include tests for question rendering, user interaction, and validation logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover all new question types
Tests verify correct rendering and interaction
Test coverage for listening exercises increased
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive test suite covering expanded listening exercises and new question types

outputPlan.description: Added tests for new question types and expanded exercises

metadata.inputContext: Updated listening exercise components and data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures quality and correctness of expanded listening exercises
